summary: Payment Schedule CRUD Testing Complete - Backend 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend UI Verified with full CRUD flow

ui_bugs.issue: Balance column shows '₹NaN' in totals footer when summary.payment_received might be undefined

action_items: Fix ₹NaN in totals row - check if summary.payment_received is undefined before calculation
seed_data_creation: Test payment stages created with 'TEST_' and 'UI Test' prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment Schedule CRUD fully functional for Planning role. Flow: Add via bulk dialog → Edit via edit dialog → Delete via trash icon → Submit to change status from Draft to Requested. All APIs tested: POST /api/payment-stages/bulk, PATCH /api/payment-stages/{id}, DELETE /api/payment-stages/{id}, POST /api/projects/{id}/payment-schedule/submit

add_payment_stages_bulk.details: Planning can add multiple payment stages via bulk add dialog with stage_name, percentage, amount, due_date

edit_payment_stage.details: Edit dialog opens with current values, auto-calculation works for percentage/amount, Save Changes persists data

delete_draft_payment_stage.details: Trash icon visible only for Draft stages, confirmation dialog shown, stage deleted successfully

submit_payment_schedule.details: Submit Schedule button shows count of draft items, confirmation dialog shows summary, status changes from Draft to Requested

status_transitions.details: Draft → Requested transition verified. Edit/Delete buttons hidden for Requested stages

auto_calculation.details: When percentage entered, amount auto-calculates. When amount entered, percentage auto-calculates based on project total value

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/payment-stages/bulk: PASS - Creates multiple payment stages in draft status
api_endpoints_tested.PATCH /api/payment-stages/{id}: PASS - Updates stage_name, percentage, amount, due_date
api_endpoints_tested.DELETE /api/payment-stages/{id}: PASS - Deletes payment stage (Planning role allowed)
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/projects/{id}/payment-schedule: PASS - Changes all draft stages to 'requested' status
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/projects/{id}/payment-stages: PASS - Returns all payment stages for project

ui_verified.payments_tab: PASS - Shows table with S.NO, STAGE, %, AMOUNT, RECEIVED, BALANCE, STATUS, ACTIONS columns
ui_verified.add_payments_button: PASS - Opens bulk add dialog with multiple rows
ui_verified.edit_button: PASS - Pencil icon visible for draft items, opens edit dialog
ui_verified.delete_button: PASS - Trash icon visible for draft items, confirmation required
ui_verified.submit_schedule_button: PASS - Shows count of draft items, opens confirmation dialog
ui_verified.status_badges: PASS - Draft (gray), Requested (blue) badges display correctly

data_testid_elements.submit-schedule-btn: Submit Schedule button (shows when drafts exist)
data_testid_elements.submit-bulk-payment-btn: Submit All button in bulk add dialog
data_testid_elements.edit-payment-{stage_id}: Edit button for each payment row
data_testid_elements.delete-payment-{stage_id}: Delete button for each payment row
data_testid_elements.edit-payment-stage-name: Stage name input in edit dialog
data_testid_elements.save-payment-edit-btn: Save Changes button in edit dialog

mocked_apis.none: All APIs are real - no mocked endpoints
